impact: The daemon was blocked because the only remaining selectable item was a stale implementation retry even though its prerequisite guards had passed and later independent work had already completed. This replacement removes that retry from checkbox selection, records it as parked, and gives the worker deterministic supervisor/task-selection work before any future solar extractor retry.
summary: Park the stale blocked solar extractor retry and append narrow validation-first daemon recovery tasks so the PP&D worker has selectable work again.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 1 task(s) are blocked: Task checkbox-81: Retry the solar permit requirement extractor as a no-dataclass one-file implementation only after the replacement-size guard and malformed-comparison diagnostic pass; use plain constants and functions, preserve the syntax sentinel, and compare against the existing seven-record expected-output fixture only.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
